# API Contracts Checklist: Non-Stopping Reviewability Markers

**Purpose**: Validate internal script and JSON contract requirements for marker planning, final backstop, multi-PR emission, and task-gate compatibility before task generation.
**Created**: 2026-06-12
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md) | [data-model.md](../data-model.md) | [contracts/](../contracts/)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are all required `pr_marker_plan` top-level fields defined, including schema version, kind, feature ID, status, source fingerprint, ordered markers, warnings, and timestamps? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006, Data Model §PR Marker Plan, Contract §pr-marker-plan.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK002 Are marker status values defined for planned, checkpointing, emission-ready, emitted, collapsed, stale, and invalid lifecycle states? [Completeness, Data Model §PR Marker Plan, Contract §pr-marker-plan.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK003 Are each marker's required fields defined for ID, review order, kind, parent marker, source boundary, task IDs, folded Polish tasks, declared files, declared tests, reviewability, hazards, subdivision, checkpoint, emission mapping, and warnings? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Data Model §PR Marker]
- [ ] CHK004 Are warning objects consistently specified with `code`, `severity`, `message`, `source`, and `details` across marker plans, marker evidence, and final split results? [Consistency, Spec §Marker Evidence, Contract §pr-marker-plan.schema.json, Contract §marker-split-result.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK005 Is the source fingerprint contract complete enough to tie marker plans to spec, plan-declared scope, tasks, reviewability evidence, and hazard decision inputs? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014, Plan §State And Evidence Contract]
- [ ] CHK006 Does the plan specify the marker-aware `plan-layers.sh` API: accepted inputs, stdout or persisted output envelope, status values, exit-code meanings, and how it creates or updates `pr_marker_plan` without changing legacy layer-planner consumers? [Resolved, Plan §Marker-Aware Script API Contracts]
- [ ] CHK007 Are repo-relative evidence path formats and allowed roots defined for marker reviewability evidence, implementation checkpoint evidence, final-backstop evidence, emission packet paths, and PR URL/number mappings? [Resolved, Plan §Marker-Aware Script API Contracts]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK008 Are stable marker ID formats clear for `foundation`, `us<N>`, `us<N>-part<M>`, and `full-spec`? [Clarity, Spec §Key Entities, Contract §pr-marker-plan.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK009 Is one-based `review_order` clearly defined as agreeing with `markers[]` order and not JSON object key order? [Clarity, Spec §Assumptions, Data Model §PR Marker Plan]
- [ ] CHK010 Are `marker_split`, `single_pr`, and `correctness_stop` final-backstop outcomes defined with measurable proceed/stop behavior? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012, Contract §marker-split-result.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK011 Does the final-backstop API specify how `final-reviewability-backstop.sh` receives or locates the current `pr_marker_plan`, validates fingerprint freshness, writes marker-split evidence, and hands that evidence to marker-based PR emission? [Resolved, Plan §Final Backstop Marker Split API]
- [ ] CHK012 Is `reviewability-gate.sh tasks` compatibility clear enough that lower-level task-mode exit codes remain stable while autopilot owns stdout and exit-code interpretation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013, Plan §Error Handling Semantics]
- [ ] CHK013 Is `not_estimated` explicitly excluded from marker input unless a future compatibility-safe contract adds an advisory rule? [Clarity, Plan §Error Handling Semantics]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK014 Are `pr_marker_plan.status`, marker `implementation_checkpoint.status`, marker `emission_mapping.status`, and final split `outcome` values distinct enough to prevent consumers from mixing lifecycle state with command result state? [Consistency, Data Model §PR Marker Plan, Contract §pr-marker-plan.schema.json, Contract §marker-split-result.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK015 Does the multi-PR emission API define marker-aware inputs and outputs, including whether `multi-pr-emission.sh` consumes `pr_marker_plan` directly or through a derived packet, how hazard collapse is represented, and how per-marker packets map back to source marker IDs? [Resolved, Plan §Multi-PR Marker Emission API]
- [ ] CHK016 Are hazard-collapse rules consistent between marker plan status, final-backstop emission route, and multi-PR packet mapping? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Data Model §PR Marker, Contract §marker-split-result.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK017 Are safe subdivision replacement rules consistent between the parent/child marker schema and the final PR packet emission sequence? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Data Model §PR Marker]
- [ ] CHK018 Are legacy PRSG-008 layer-plan outputs and PRSG-009 slice packet concepts explicitly separated from the new marker-plan contract so consumers know which API is authoritative for PRSG-013 emission? [Consistency, Plan §Structure Decision, Existing Contract §plan-layers.schema.json]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK019 Are requirements defined for valid task-mode `status=block` JSON with exit code 1 becoming marker-planning input while code 2, invalid JSON, missing mode/status, stale evidence, and non-size blockers stop? [Coverage, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Plan §Error Handling Semantics]
- [ ] CHK020 Are requirements defined for final full-diff size block plus valid marker plan producing `marker_split`, exit 0, and marker-aware emission evidence? [Coverage, Spec §FR-012, Contract §marker-split-result.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK021 Are requirements defined for final full-diff size block plus missing, stale, malformed, or fingerprint-mismatched marker plan producing `correctness_stop` without PR side effects? [Coverage, Spec §FR-014, Plan §Error Handling Semantics]
- [ ] CHK022 Are requirements defined for a hazard-collapsed emission packet that preserves original marker IDs, checkpoints, warnings, and review order while emitting one `full-spec` PR? [Coverage, Spec §FR-010, Data Model §Emission Packet]
- [ ] CHK023 Do fixture requirements explicitly require schema validation and stable machine-readable stdout or persisted JSON for `plan-layers.sh`, `final-reviewability-backstop.sh`, `multi-pr-emission.sh`, and task-gate compatibility cases? [Resolved, Plan §Contract Fixture Requirements]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK024 Do success criteria measure canonical marker-plan output for Foundation, user stories, safe subdivisions, and hazard collapse? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-004, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK025 Do success criteria measure one scoped PR packet per marker in non-hazard fixtures and exactly one mapped packet in hazard fixtures? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-003, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK026 Do verification requirements cover both contract schema parsing and behavior fixtures for the new marker-aware command paths? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-016, Spec §SC-006, Plan §Testing]
- [ ] CHK027 Are PR packet validation requirements stated before PR body generation, `gh pr create`, or equivalent side effects? [Traceability, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements, Plan §Error Handling Semantics]
- [ ] CHK028 Are backward-compatibility expectations for existing task gate callers measurable without requiring lower-level `reviewability-gate.sh tasks` behavior changes? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-013, Research §Keep `reviewability-gate.sh tasks` compatible]

## Notes

- Items carrying unresolved gap markers require spec.md and/or plan.md remediation before G4 can pass.

## Re-Run Verification

- [ ] CHK029 Does the updated plan preserve legacy `plan-layers.sh <feature-dir>` behavior while defining an opt-in marker-aware contract with stable status and exit-code semantics? [Resolved, Plan §Marker-Aware Script API Contracts]
- [ ] CHK030 Does the updated plan require repo-relative runtime evidence under `specs/prsg-013-reviewability-markers/.process/` and constrain PR number/URL mappings separately from file paths? [Resolved, Plan §Marker-Aware Script API Contracts]
- [ ] CHK031 Does the updated plan define final-backstop marker-plan validation, `marker_split` evidence output, exit behavior, and correctness-stop behavior before PR side effects? [Resolved, Plan §Final Backstop Marker Split API]
- [ ] CHK032 Does the updated plan define marker-aware multi-PR inputs, per-marker packets, hazard-collapsed packet mapping, and packet validation before body generation or PR creation? [Resolved, Plan §Multi-PR Marker Emission API]
- [ ] CHK033 Does the updated plan require Layer 4 fixtures to assert stable machine-readable output, schema fields, status/outcome values, exit codes, evidence paths, and no-side-effect stops for the marker-aware paths? [Resolved, Plan §Contract Fixture Requirements]
